seoTitle: Cape Pillar vs Cape Raoul — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Pillar and Cape Raoul. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Pillar vs Cape Raoul: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Pillar and Cape Raoul.
heading: Cape Pillar vs Cape Raoul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Pillar, Tasmania and Cape Raoul, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Raoul has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Cape Pillar (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Pillar or Cape Raoul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Pillar has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Cape Raoul scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Pillar scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Raoul scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Pillar or Cape Raoul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Raoul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
